follow_ups.title: Start at login preference
follow_ups.reason: Closed-alpha testers may expect the utility to start automatically, but login-item registration and preference UI should be implemented as a separate user-controlled feature.

follow_ups.title: First-run onboarding window
follow_ups.reason: A guided onboarding flow could explain Gatekeeper, permissions, hotkeys, and local model startup, but it expands the UI surface beyond this menu-bar hardening pass.

follow_ups.title: Settings window for hotkeys and runtime state
follow_ups.reason: Non-technical testers will eventually need a visible place to inspect and change hotkeys and runtime preferences. This requires a broader settings model and is out of scope for the current closed-alpha lifecycle pass.
